sections.heading: Complete Hindi sentence practice
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: See sentences below

main har din subah jaldi uthkar exercise karta hoon
school mein humein bahut kuch seekhne ko milta hai
meri family mein char log hain
mujhe kitabein padhna bahut pasand hai
hum sab milkar kaam karte hain
aaj ka din bahut achha hai
mujhe apne desh par garv hai
humare ghar mein ek chhota bagicha hai
bahar mausam bahut achha hai
mujhe gaane sunna bahut pasand hai

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Complete Hindi sentence practice skills.
